name: 11q14_DLG2_SD
description: 11q14.1 segmental duplication interval inside the very large DLG2 (PSD-93) gene body. Intronic SDs predispose to recurrent intragenic DLG2 deletions associated with schizophrenia and neurodevelopmental phenotypes.

architecture.internal_structure: Intronic SDs of 5-30 kb at ~94% identity; large gene body (~2.2 Mb) with multiple repeat-prone introns; family-internal SDs to DLG1/3/4.
